title: Create workdoc from a template via API
excerpt: Is there a way to create a new workdoc from a template in specific workspace and folder?

posts.author: jyuc (Jeff)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to create a new workdoc from a template in specific workspace and folder?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @jyuc,

You can create the doc in a specific location as explained here, but you can not do it from a template via API.

Let me know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
Matias
